name: jira-dashboard
description: Jira AI Dashboard — standalone dev mode

scripts.dev: npx concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: cd api && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.start: npx concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run start:api" "npm run start:frontend"
